name: Selection Card
description: A 2-stage category selection card system for interactive choice flows.

guidelines.purpose: Selection Card is designed for multi-step category selection flows. Stage 1 presents broad categories, and Stage 2 reveals granular options with the parent category highlighted.

states.not_selected: Category overview. 2-column x 4-row grid of icons + labels with chevrons.
states.selected: Detailed options. 4-column x 2-row grid with the relative item highlighted. Includes a bottom confirm button.

anatomy.container: Selcard base with linear gradient background (var(--color-gradient-background-ai-surface-stop-1) to var(--color-gradient-background-ai-surface-stop-2)).
anatomy.header: Icons and descriptive text for context.
anatomy.chip_group: Grid of interactive chips. Nav chips (chevron) or Option chips (selection state).
anatomy.action: Confirm button at the bottom of the 'selected' stage.
